previewInstruction.description: HTML markup shown on the PreviewScreen before the game starts.

previewAudioText.description: Plain-text version of the preview instruction. Used by the TTS pipeline at deploy time.

previewAudio.description: CDN URL of the synthesised preview audio. null is allowed (PreviewScreen falls back to runtime TTS).

showGameOnPreview.description: Whether to render the gameplay surface behind the preview overlay. Always false for this game.

totalRounds.description: Number of rounds (levels) per playthrough. Must equal 4 for this game.

totalLives.description: Total lives shared across all rounds.

answerComponent.description: Whether the AnswerComponent (post-game answer carousel) is enabled.

set.description: Round-set key. Game expects at least 3 distinct set values (e.g. A, B, C) per GEN-ROUNDSETS-MIN-3.

id.description: Stable, unique question_id. Used by the gauge skill for cross-session analytics.

stage.description: Logical stage index (matches round in this game).

type.description: Round-mechanic type. Only Type A (tap-all-correct-pairs) is implemented.

targetSum.description: Target sum the student must hit by tapping correct pills (e.g. 10 or 20).

levelTitle.description: Banner shown above the board, e.g. 'Make Sum 10'.

pills.description: All pills shown on the board. Each pill is a + b. The game hard-codes an 8-pill grid; content sets that need more or fewer must alter the layout.

id.description: Pill identifier (e.g. 'p1'). Must be unique within the round.

correctPills.description: IDs of pills where a + b === targetSum.

misconception_tags.description: Map of pill id → misconception tag for every non-correct (distractor) pill on the board.

answer.description: Mirror of the round's solved state used by AnswerComponent.renderAnswerForRound.
